artDirection.name: Atlas Sumi Terrain
artDirection.description: A repository-owned Japanese ink terrain and coastline treatment authored specifically for Atlas.

coastline.method: double ink shoreline plus authored coastal hachures around the ten smoothed region masses

mountains.method: deterministic ridge symbols generated from region centroids, hull scale and stable region-id seeds

forests.method: deterministic tree clusters distributed inside region composition masses

rivers.method: one or more original flowing curves per region, clipped to authored land

routes.method: curved composition corridors derived from the twenty region adjacency suggestions

anchors.method: retain all fifty confirmed alignment anchors as independent verification guides

forbiddenInputs: traced coastlines, terrain, rivers, roads, labels or textures
nextAction: generate and visually review the first repository-owned terrain and coastline draft before final labels, iconography and canvas freeze
